name: public
description: Static assets served directly by the web server. Includes images, internationalization (i18n) localization files, and textures for 3D visualizations.

subfolders.name: locales
subfolders.description: JSON files containing translation strings for English (en) and Hindi (hi).

subfolders.name: textures
subfolders.description: Graphical textures for 3D planet models and background effects.

subfolders.name: pdf-presets
subfolders.description: Images and icons used exclusively for branding within generated PDF documents.

subfiles.name: favicon.ico
subfiles.description: Website icon displayed in browser tabs.
